name: Pilbara Gold Limited
description: Pilbara Gold Limited is an Australian gold explorer focused on advancing its 100%-owned flagship 2.1 Moz Mt York Gold Project, located in the mineral-rich Pilbara region of Western Australia. The company has defined significant gold mineralisation within the project area and is supported by an experienced management and technical team. With a substantial Mineral Resource, Pilbara Gold is actively targeting resource growth in the near-term while also exploring its broader portfolio of projects, including the Roe Hills Project, which holds potential for gold, nickel, cobalt, lithium, and rare earth elements.
